label: Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning

node.label: Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning
node.definition: Supervised fine-tuning and instruction tuning train models on curated input–response examples so they follow task descriptions and conversational conventions.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning is modeled as depending on Supervised learning, Large-scale pretraining and feeding downstream nodes such as Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA, Reward-model training, RLHF & RLAIF, Direct and online preference optimization.

atlas downstream link to Direct and online preference optimization
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Large-scale pretraining.
